Experience Design — with a rich synthesis of digital ecosystems, physical products and emerging technologies. 

ammarbasharat121@gmail.com

Ammar Basharat

Experience Design leader with a rich synthesis of digital ecosystems, physical products and emerging technologies. 

 

Driven by a deep commitment to human-centred principles, I define problem spaces and translate ambiguity into future-facing concepts. I explore Speculative Design with a pragmatic, hands-on mentality — generating briefs proactively, prototyping when the patterns don't yet exist, and building executive conviction through the narrative quality of my vision.

Latest Project

Future Me

Which factors contribute to the perception of futuristic interfaces? Which sensation will futuristic interfaces evoke? This critical design project dives into the potential interactions between humans and technology within futuristic environments, employing a mixed media methodology. It's an ongoing project that has transitioned from a visual artefact to an exploration of motion and interaction, aiming at the exploration of holistic digital experiences through speculative design.

Science Meets Fiction, Artificial Intelligence in Movies

Live Moderation • Barcelona

Adobe Live Interviews with OFFF speakers Stefan Sagmeister, Baugasm, Art & Graft, Buck, Vallée Duhmael, Stuart Langfield

Ammar is available for project collaborations and explorative workshops to empower futuristic thinking.

​

As a speaker, she introduces Speculative Design Approaches in Experience Design and shares her perspective on the Future of Creativity with a focus on design.

Let's talk!

Short CV

With a strategic background spanning brand, digital product and experience design, I have collaborated with global brands, startups, agencies and some of the most talented technologists and creatives in the field.

​

Find regular updates and work-in-progress on my LinkedIn profile. 

LinkedIn CV

Nothing

Experience Design, Industrial Design Team / London

“Designing smart products that people love to interact with – every moment, every day.”

Bridging human-computer interaction and industrial design to create intuitive, functional hardware and software experiences. Interaction strategies and iterative prototyping are key to refining physical form and user behaviour. 

​

Image: Nothing Tech Ltd

eBay

Product Management & Experience Strategy / Berlin

“Holistic experiences and human-centred strategies drive the engagement and trust of users in a thriving loyalty and rewards program.”

Developing experience improvements for eBay Plus (loyalty & rewards program), increasing engagement and customer trust.

Salzburg University of Applied Sciences

Senior Lecturer for Human-Centred Design

“Receiving endless inspiration and insights in exchange for feedback and shared experiences makes educating  future technologists fulfilling”

Fostering a design-driven mindset that enables the responsible and ethical development of digital products with real purpose. Educational input on future-facing design methodologies, Speculative Design, and emerging technologies

Onefootball

Head of Product Design, User Experience / Berlin

“Football fans' passion for their team drives digital product development beyond data. It's relying on intuition, empathy, and a unified team mindset centred around a love for the game.”

Shaping the overarching experience vision and design language for native iOS/Android and web products in a high-growth sports media startup — defining end-to-end customer journeys for a global audience.

Adobe

Adobe Live Content Experience & Strategy , Germany & UK 

"An open and diverse community is key to infinite creativity and personal growth."

Content strategy and experience planning for Adobe Live — a program introducing new and technologies in Creative Cloud apps through inspirational interviews and educational tutorials.

Onefootball

User Experience Design & Team Management

Design leadership and management of the visual design, product design, user research and user support teams. Supervision of holistic experience design decisions across platforms, applications and content areas. 

Adobe Live

Live Moderation,  Interviews

& Video Content Strategy
